nodes.name: Get Current Guild Members
nodes.notes: FIX 8: limit=1000 is Discord API maximum. For guilds with >1000 members, implement pagination using the after= parameter.

parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'known_channel_members' LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ('known_channel_members', $1::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()
SELECT id FROM drafts WHERE type = 'client_welcome' AND status IN ('approved', 'executed', 'pending') LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Post Draft via Approval Gate (Sub-Workflow 02)
nodes.notes: Replace WORKFLOW_02_ID with the actual n8n ID of workflow 02 after import.
